label: hardware_industry_manufacturers
representative_docs: See [Micron moving Crucial RAM from consumer to AI](
AI datacenter hardware is far more profitable than consumer hardware, so companies are shifting focus there.

The execs running the companies that make a lot of the required components for phones and other consumer hardware, namely RAM and solid state memory, have flat-out said "Fuck the consumer market, we're pivoting all our capacity into making parts for the AI slop market so we can charge them premium prices and fatten our bonuses".

label: privacy_apps_app
representative_docs: People also say they deeply value privacy in surveys, but behaviorally they’ll accept almost any permission to use a free app.
Under Android’s model, that same location permission also grants WiFi scan access.
when an app says “allow access to location,” almost nobody connects that to “this app can now fingerprint my physical position via WiFi BSSIDs and sell that to data brokers.”
